briefings.title: Meridian Daily Briefing — Sunday Evening
briefings.overview: BTC at ~$60,922 after worst weekly slide since FTX. Jobs report crushes rate cut hopes. SpaceX mega-IPO next week threatens liquidity drain. Fear & Greed index at 8/100 — extreme fear.

stories.title: BTC Crashes to $59,100 — Worst Weekly Slide Since FTX
stories.analysis: Bitcoin hit an intraday low of $59,100 on June 5, marking a 26.8% decline over 30 days. Over 50% of all BTC now sits at an unrealized loss — a signal that has historically marked every major bear market bottom.

stories.title: $1.85 Billion in Liquidations Flush Leveraged Traders
stories.analysis: The derivatives market saw $1.75B+ liquidated in 24 hours on June 5, with longs accounting for $1.45B. BTC alone saw $833M in liquidations, ETH another $480M. Over 351,000 traders were wiped out.

stories.title: Blowout U.S. Jobs Data Kills Rate Cut Expectations
stories.analysis: U.S. job growth blew past forecasts on June 5, setting the stage for Fed rate hikes rather than cuts. Multiple analysts now expect a rate hike by year-end. Higher-for-longer rates are fundamentally bearish for crypto and growth assets.

stories.title: SpaceX Mega-IPO Set for June 12 at $135/Share
stories.analysis: SpaceX plans to raise a record $75 billion at $135/share, surpassing Saudi Aramco's 2019 IPO. This will suck significant liquidity from markets as institutional money rotates into what's being called the IPO of the decade.

stories.title: Ethereum Drops to ~$1,555 — 23% Loss in 7 Days
stories.analysis: ETH is trading at approximately $1,554, down over 23% in a week from ~$2,004 on June 1. The selloff is accelerating with 24h volume at $21B+. ETH/BTC ratio continues to weaken.

stories.title: Fear & Greed Index at 8/100 — Extreme Fear
stories.analysis: The Crypto Fear & Greed Index has cratered to 8 out of 100 — a level associated with capitulation and historically strong buying opportunities. The index has not been this low since the 2022 bear market.

stories.title: Clarity Act Progress — But Unlikely to Pass in 2026
stories.analysis: The Clarity Act cleared the Senate Banking Committee on May 14, a major win for crypto regulation. However, Bitwise's head of research says there's still 'a lot of disconnect' between parties and it likely won't pass this year.

stories.title: CFTC Approves Bitcoin Perpetual Futures
stories.analysis: A bright spot: the CFTC officially approved the listing of Bitcoin perpetual futures in the US, creating a compliant perps market for the first time. This is structurally positive for market maturation.

briefings.title: Meridian Market Check-In — Saturday Afternoon
briefings.overview: BTC holding $61,900 but weekly decline of 8.6%. Strong May jobs report crushes rate cut hopes. Iran war continues to elevate geopolitical risk. Tech bloodbath drags all risk assets.

stories.title: Bitcoin Crashes to ~$61,900 — Testing Key Support
stories.analysis: BTC fell sharply following the jobs report, trading around $61,900 on Friday — down from ~$73,500 at the start of June and 58% below its October 2025 ATH. The strong dollar and rate hike expectations are the primary headwinds.

stories.title: S&P 500 Falls 2.6%, Nasdaq Biggest Point Drop on Record
stories.analysis: The worst day for equities since October: S&P 500 fell 2.6%, Nasdaq plunged 4.2% (1,100+ pts), and Dow dropped ~700 points. Fed rate hike probability now exceeds 60% by year-end per CME FedWatch.

stories.title: Iran War Continues to Roil Energy & Macro Markets
stories.analysis: The 2026 Iran conflict has caused a 70% oil price spike and remains a persistent macro overhang. A ceasefire appears to be holding but markets are pricing in uncertainty.

stories.title: Tech Bloodbath: NVDA -6.2%, AVGO -7.9%, MU -13.3%
stories.analysis: Semiconductor stocks led the selloff. Broadcom's earnings weighed on sentiment, and Micron's 13% drop was the worst in the S&P 500. The AI trade is showing cracks.

stories.title: DeFi: Hack Losses Drop 90% in May
stories.analysis: CertiK reports crypto hack losses fell to $68.3M in May (down 90%). However, the SUI DeFi protocol Volo was exploited. RWA tokenization is approaching $30B in TVL.

briefings.title: Meridian Morning Briefing — Saturday Morning
briefings.overview: BTC at $60,900 — worst weekly slide in months. ETH sub-$1,560 leading the selloff. Strong jobs report crushes rate cut hopes. Fear & Greed at extreme fear. Two major crypto regulations incoming.

stories.title: BTC Drops to ~$60.9K — Worst Weekly Slide in Months
stories.analysis: Bitcoin has fallen sharply over the past week: from ~$66.6K on June 3 to ~$60.9K today. That's an 8.6% decline in 3 days and roughly 18% off its recent highs.

stories.title: ETH Leading the Selloff — Sub-$1,560
stories.analysis: Ethereum is trading around $1,556–$1,568, down ~10% on the week. ETH is underperforming BTC, reflecting broader altcoin weakness.

stories.title: Genius Act & Clarity Act — Two Major Crypto Regulations Incoming
stories.analysis: The Genius Act (stablecoin framework) is entering implementation this summer. The Clarity Act (market structure bill) could be signed by July, shifting oversight to the more crypto-friendly CFTC.

stories.title: EU MiCA Deadline: July 1, 2026 — Weeks Away
stories.analysis: The EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets regulation transitional period ends in less than a month. VASPs operating under temporary licenses must achieve full compliance or cease operations.

stories.title: Crypto Hack Losses Drop 90% in May — CertiK
stories.analysis: CertiK reported that crypto hack losses fell to just $68.3M in May, a 90% drop. DeFi security is improving. Top DeFi performers: Velvet (+33%), Babylon (+28%), Yala (+17%).
